title: U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm
summary_full: An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday.
summary_public: An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says
